name: io.github.TopoLift/topolift-mcp
title: TopoLift Negotiation
description: Atom-grounded negotiation reasoning. Typed topology slot, inline citations, public dialect.

environmentVariables.name: TOPOLIFT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer key from topolift.ai (Stripe-provisioned). Required for topolift_negotiate; topolift_dialect works without it. Autonomous agents can pay per call via x402 directly against the API instead.

environmentVariables.name: TOPOLIFT_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Override only if pointing at a non-default deployment.
